acceptanceCriteria: Each composition exists as a typed packages/ui export, built from #412's elements (no duplicated primitive logic)
Toasts and loading indicators respect prefers-reduced-motion and are announced via an accessible live region
Charts use Recharts, series colors from packages/theme CSS variables, keyboard-accessible, with a text equivalent for screen readers
Navigation is keyboard-operable with a visible focus-visible state and correct active-route indication
Vietnamese copy where the composition renders text
Import-boundary tests confirm these compositions are importable by apps/demo and do not import from any apps/*

resolvedDecisions.decision: Implement packages/ui feedback + navigation compositions only (toasts, loaders, navigation, charts); no destination screens.
Keep PrimaryNavigation public API; extend/complete navigation compositions per navigation.md without breaking Home shell consumers.
Unblocked — #412 merged via PR #415 onto origin/main.
Run in parallel with exclusive file ownership; do not edit card/dialog/form/table/popover files owned by #413.

inScope: packages/ui Toast (stacking, auto-dismiss, live region, reduced-motion)
packages/ui navigation compositions (preserve PrimaryNavigation; add secondary as design requires)
packages/ui Chart primitives via Recharts + theme CSS variables + text equivalent
Vietnamese copy; keyboard + focus-visible; active-route indication
outOfScope: apps/demo destination screens beyond import-boundary proof
Backend, auth, live data, deploy, apps/dashboard product changes

# Issue #414 — packages/ui feedback + navigation compositions

## In scope
- Build typed packages/ui compositions: toasts, loading indicators, navigation, charts.
- Toasts/loaders: prefers-reduced-motion + aria-live.
- Charts: Recharts + theme CSS variables + keyboard + text equivalent.
- Navigation: keyboard, focus-visible, active-route.
- Vietnamese text; import-boundary proof for apps/demo.

## Out of scope
- #413 cards/dialogs/forms/tables/popovers; destination screens; backend/auth/deploy.

## Edge design docs
- docs/product/design/Components/toasts.md
- docs/product/design/Components/loading-indicators.md
- docs/product/design/Components/navigation.md
- docs/product/design/Components/charts.md
